query:
ALTER TABLE partners 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS priorityScore INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS avgLeadResponseHours DECIMAL(6,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 24.00,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS partnersReferred INT NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS referredByPartnerId INT NULL;
